title: get_cached_or_scan precondition (client must be connected) undocumented
description: get_cached_or_scan calls state.client.as_mut().unwrap() without asserting or documenting that the caller must have called ensure_connected first. A contributor reading this function in isolation cannot know this. Fix: add a doc comment: '# Panics / Panics if state.client is None. Call ensure_connected before this function.' Or add debug_assert!(state.client.is_some(), ...) as a belt-and-suspenders guard that fires in tests if the invariant is violated.
